title: Play
description: Plays an audio file to the caller. Supports WAV and MP3 formats hosted at a URL. Can play a single file or cycle through a list of files.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

url.description: The URL(s) of the audio file(s) to play. Supports WAV and MP3. If an array, files are played in sequence.

loop.description: Number of times to repeat playback. Use 0 or 'forever' to loop indefinitely until interrupted.

earlyMedia.description: If true, play the audio as early media before the call is answered.

seekOffset.description: Start playback at this offset in seconds from the beginning of the file.

timeoutSecs.description: Maximum time in seconds to play the audio. Playback stops after this duration even if the file has not finished.

actionHook.description: A webhook to invoke when playback completes.
